rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 27, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT OLIVER PAINE DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CCP 1013 (when the moving party realized that cross-complainant in his capacity as the trustee has not been properly served, moving party failed to re-notice the demurrer for a date that would comply with CCP 1005 and CCC 1013) and with CCP 430.41 ("If an amended complaint, cross-complaint, or answer is filed, the responding party shall meet and confer again with the party who filed the amended pleading before filing a demurrer to the amended pleading.") If demurrer is to be re-filed, moving party is to immediately initiate meet and confer and file a declaration of compliance no later than February 28, 2019. Opposing party to promptly respond. If demurrer is to be re-filed, it is to be filed and served no later than March 7, 2019 along with a meet-and-confer declaration; otherwise an answer shall be filed by March 7, 2019; or if parties agree that an amended complaint will be filed, parties to appear ex-parte to obtain an order for leave to amend on March 7, 2019. = (501/REQ)
